Bodha™ Learning Platform
Design the
City of Tomorrow

Build a complete smart city from the ground up — zone by zone, building by building. Master IoT integration, CO₂ budgets, interior planning, and sustainable urban design.

Interactive drag-and-drop city grid with 8 zone types
Real-time CO₂ & sustainability scoring
50+ smart buildings with IoT sensor integrations
Interior design for every building
Team play · Expert challenges · City report
